integrationsHint: Add your WaveSpeed API key: Account → Connections → WaveSpeed.
demoModelHint: Demo without credits: any profile model (Regular / NSFW) except Wan 2.7 Pro. Or top up credits.

gate.noPermission: No studio generation permission — contact the account owner.
gate.grokMainUnavailable: Grok is not configured on the server — Main mode is temporarily unavailable.
gate.grokFaceSwapUnavailable: Grok is not configured — Face swap mode is temporarily unavailable.
gate.faceSwapNoModel: Face swap: select a model (identity reference) in the Model block.
gate.faceSwapNoRef: Face swap: upload a reference — scene photo with the person to replace with your model.
gate.mainNoModel: Main: select a model with turnaround/face/body and JSON profile.
gate.mainNoRef: Main: upload a scene reference — Grok and WaveSpeed use it for the frame.
gate.promptNoGrok: Prompt only: Grok is required on the server.
gate.promptNoModel: Prompt only: select a model with Full body photo (and Intimate for NSFW).
gate.promptNoText: Prompt only: describe the scene in the prompt field.
gate.grokComposeNoScene: Face swap: upload a scene reference (pose, light, framing).
gate.grokComposeNoIdentity: Face swap: select a cabinet model or upload an identity photo.
gate.photoEditNoImage: Photo edit: upload an image or pick from archive History.
gate.photoEditNoPrompt: Photo edit: describe what to change in the prompt.
gate.photoEditMaskNeedsImage: Mask requires an image — upload a file or pick from archive.
gate.noFaceNoInput: No face: select a model or upload a scene reference.
gate.needInput: Add a prompt, reference photo and/or select a saved model.
gate.poseRefOrModel: Select a model or enable «Send pose ref to WaveSpeed» for the uploaded photo.
gate.openaiUnavailable: Studio text model unavailable on server — generation temporarily disabled.

page.tagline: Model, reference and description — results in history on the right.
page.devOutputHint: Vite dev build + server <mono>STUDIO_ALLOW_PROMPT_ONLY=true</mono> only: WaveSpeed is skipped; final JSON prompt shown below.
page.paywallBody: To generate images, top up credits or subscribe to Standard / Pro under Plan & balance.
page.paywallOwnerHint: Open account → Plan & balance, choose a plan and pay.
page.paywallMemberHint: The account owner ({{email}}) can subscribe under Plan & balance.
page.noGeneratePermission: Generation unavailable for your permissions. Contact the account owner.
page.grokNotConfigured: Grok not configured: server needs <mono>GROK_API_KEY</mono> (or OpenAI-compatible vision key).

models.paywall: Model editing requires an active owner subscription.
models.askOwner: Ask the owner to subscribe in account settings.
models.lead: Models are injected into prompts on the Images tab. Up to {{max}} photos per model. Set type per photo: face, body, intimate ref or general — affects image-edit order and LLM text.
models.name: Name
models.exportPhoneHint: Noise, JPEG and EXIF on saved studio frames. Phone EXIF refs below, else preset from list. Front or main camera chosen per generation on Images page.
models.emptyList: No models yet — create one above.
models.deleteConfirm: Delete model and all its photos?

wavespeed.title: Step 1 of 3 — WaveSpeed key
wavespeed.bodyOwner: Without a WaveSpeed API key the studio cannot generate images or video. Open Connections and paste your key.
wavespeed.bodyMember: Ask the account owner to add a WaveSpeed key under Account → Connections.

model.title: Step 2 of 3 — your model
model.body: Create a model in account settings: name and a few photos (face, body) so the studio knows the look.

generate.title: Step 3 of 3 — first image
generate.body: On Images use Main mode: model with turnaround + scene reference — body from the model, pose as close as possible to the ref. Face swap balances differently (reference affects body more).

firstGenWizard.title: Try the studio in 2 minutes
firstGenWizard.lead: Two photos — model and scene reference. We place the look from the first shot into the frame from the second.
firstGenWizard.nsfwHint: For explicit references — WAN model. Demo generations use free credits.
firstGenWizard.regularHint: For everyday scenes — Nano Banana. Works for most references.
firstGenWizard.wsLead: On the Pro plan you need your own WaveSpeed key. On Standard and Credits the platform may use its own key.
firstGenWizard.success: Done — first image is in the archive.
firstGenWizard.resultSaved: Result saved under Saved — open the Images tab.
firstGenWizard.saveModelSaved: Model «{{name}}» saved — you can pick it in studio and workflow.
firstGenWizard.saveModelHint: Optional. We build a profile from your photo — for Main and Prompt only modes.
firstGenWizard.errWsKeyMin: Paste a WaveSpeed API key (at least 8 characters).
firstGenWizard.errNeedPhotos: Upload a model photo and a scene reference.

bootstrap.step1Lead: Two references: first — hair and face shape, second — face to overlay. You can use the result for the turnaround below.
bootstrap.promptOptionalHint: Leave empty for the default face-merge prompt. Describe your own scenario here if needed.
bootstrap.step2Lead: 16:9 frame with layout (face, profiles, full height) via GPT Image 2 Edit. Step 1 is optional — upload your photo or pick a frame from archive.
bootstrap.sheetPromptHint: Default prompt for GPT Image 2 Edit — edit before generation. Clearing the field restores the default.
bootstrap.errPickSource: Pick a source: your photo, archive frame, or step 1 result.

archiveModal.openedVideoTab: Opened video in a new tab — save from there if download did not start.
archiveModal.openedImageTab: Opened image in a new tab — save from there if download did not start.
archiveModal.downloadFailed: Download failed. Try «Open in new tab».

archivePicker.empty: No ready frames in archive yet

inpaintMask.hint: Paint white over the area to replace per the description below; black on the mask (everything else) stays untouched. If you mess up — «Clear mask».

retention.imageWithDays: WaveSpeed images are kept on the server for about {{days}} {{dayUnit}}, then deleted automatically. Save anything important to your device in advance.
retention.videoWithDays: Videos stay available via the provider link for about {{days}} {{dayUnit}}. Save anything important to your device in advance.
retention.imageDefault: WaveSpeed images are saved on the server — you can open them later.
retention.videoDefault: Finished videos can be opened and downloaded from history.

runtime.imageDownloadFailed: Download failed. On iPhone use Share menu or long-press preview above → Save to Photos.
runtime.videoSaveFailed: Could not save video. On iPhone: Share button or ⋯ menu on the player → Save video.
runtime.photoEditNoImage: In Photo edit mode upload an image or pick a shot from the Images archive.
runtime.photoEditNoPrompt: Describe what to change or fix in the photo.
runtime.mainGrokRequired: Main mode uses Grok — GROK_API_KEY is required on the server.
runtime.mainNoModel: In Main mode select a model with turnaround sheet and profile.
runtime.mainNoSceneRef: Upload a scene reference — Grok will take pose, light and framing; only model photos go into generation.
runtime.promptGrokRequired: Prompt mode uses Grok — GROK_API_KEY is required on the server.
runtime.promptNoModel: In Prompt mode select a model with a full-body photo in the cabinet.
runtime.promptNoText: In Prompt mode describe the scene in the prompt field.
runtime.needInput: Add a description, reference and/or select a saved model.
runtime.noFaceNoInput: In No-face mode select a model or upload a reference.
runtime.grokNotConfigured: Grok is not configured on the server (GROK_API_KEY in .env required).
runtime.faceSwapNoSceneRef: Upload a scene reference (pose, light, framing).
runtime.faceSwapNoIdentity: Face swap: select a cabinet model or upload a model photo (identity).
runtime.inpaintNeedImage: For a mask upload an image or pick a shot from the archive (Photo edit mode).
runtime.inpaintMaskEmpty: Draw mask is enabled: paint the replacement area or uncheck the option.
runtime.workflowMainNeedInputs: Main: model and scene reference required.
runtime.workflowFaceSwapNoScene: Face swap: upload a scene reference.
runtime.workflowModeUnsupported: Studio mode is not supported via workflow.
runtime.motionNeedFrame: Need a frame: archive, your file or a generated frame.
runtime.motionNeedInputs: Upload reference video, first-frame file or pick a shot from the archive.
runtime.motionAutoPromptNeedsVideo: For auto motion description from the clip upload reference video (or disable the option).
runtime.motionRenderSelectModel: Select a model with photos (turnaround / character sheet works best).
runtime.motionRenderNoPrompt: Describe scene, motion and outfit if needed. You can use @Image1 in the text.
runtime.motionRenderNoFrame: Need a first frame: pick from archive, upload a file or generate a frame.
runtime.upscaleNeedArchive: Open an image from Saved or generate again — an archive record is required.
runtime.carouselNeedArchive: Generate or open a shot in Result first so there is a saved frame.
runtime.wavespeedKeyMin: Paste your WaveSpeed API key (wavespeed.ai account).
runtime.llmKeyMin: Paste your WaveSpeed API key (Pro plan).
runtime.modelPhotosRequired: Select model photos first (up to {{max}} files).
runtime.geoBothOrNone: Enter both latitude and longitude for GEO, or leave both empty.
runtime.geoInvalidNumbers: Latitude and longitude must be numbers (e.g. 55.7558 and 37.6173).
runtime.tgTokenShort: Paste the full bot token from BotFather (usually longer than 40 characters).
runtime.tributeKeyRequired: Paste Tribute API key from creator panel (Settings → API Keys).
runtime.memberLoginShort: Member login: at least 3 characters (Latin letters, digits, underscore).
runtime.memberNewPasswordShort: New password: at least 8 characters or leave empty.
runtime.selectModelTop: Select a model at the top of the page.
runtime.needFirstFrame: Need a first frame: archive, your file (and «Prompt from video») or «Generate frame».
runtime.needVideoBrief: Fill in a short video brief — at least one phrase.
runtime.deleteMemberConfirm: Remove member? Their access will be revoked.
runtime.videoUploadNetwork: Network: could not upload video to server.

imageUi.devOutputHint: Dev Vite build + <mono>STUDIO_ALLOW_PROMPT_ONLY=true</mono> on server only: WaveSpeed is not called; final JSON prompt is shown below.
imageUi.proHint: Pro — higher detail, usually more credits.
imageUi.cabinetModelHintMain: Turnaround, body, face — model figure and appearance
imageUi.cabinetModelHintPromptOnly: Required — only her photos go into generation
imageUi.cabinetModelHintFaceSwap: Or upload a model photo below
imageUi.identityPhotoHintFile: Face and appearance (like identity ref in workflow)
imageUi.mainSceneHint: Frame anchor: Grok + WaveSpeed (pose, light, angle)
imageUi.faceSwapSceneHint: Pose, background, light — like scene ref in Model swap
imageUi.promptOnlyHint: Prompt mode: scene from text only, no reference photo.
imageUi.refAnalysisLead: Reference analysis detects which body parts are in frame — prompt and model photos adjust automatically (no extra face/hair instructions).
imageUi.refCropNoFace: Mode: crop without face — model face refs will not be sent to generation.
imageUi.refAutoAnalyze: You can hit Generate right away — analysis runs on the server automatically.
imageUi.pipelineMainHint: Pipeline like workflow By ref: cabinet model + scene reference (Grok describes frame, WaveSpeed builds the shot).
imageUi.pipelineFaceSwapHint: Pipeline like workflow Model swap: cabinet model or separate identity photo + scene reference with a person.
imageUi.paintMaskLabel: Draw mask with brush — mark in white what to change on the shot.
imageUi.maskFileHint: Brush alternative: fully prepared mask in an external editor.
imageUi.exifHint: When saving frame to archive, model EXIF references (selfie or main camera) or «as from phone» preset are applied.
imageUi.promptHintPromptOnly: Pose, place, outfit, light — in detail
imageUi.promptPlaceholderPromptOnly: E.g. bedroom, by the window, red dress, soft daylight…
imageUi.generationStarted: Generation started — watch progress in Saved. Result will appear automatically.
imageUi.pendingArchiveLead: Image is ready but did not land in Saved. You can save to archive without re-generating.
imageUi.upscaleNeedArchiveTitle: Pick a shot from Saved or generate again
imageUi.carouselTitle3: Same scenario and look, different angles
imageUi.carouselTitle4: Four frames for a feed — same environment and look as this shot
imageUi.videoFromImageTitle: Open Video tab with this frame
imageUi.downloadTitleIphone: On iPhone Share menu opens — save to Photos without leaving the app
imageUi.qualityHint: Pro — higher detail, usually more credits.
imageUi.modelHintMain: Turnaround, body, face — model figure and appearance
imageUi.modelHintRequired: Required — only her photos go into generation
imageUi.modelHintOrUpload: Or upload a model photo below
imageUi.identityHintUpload: Face and appearance (like identity ref in workflow)
imageUi.refAnchor: Frame anchor: Grok + WaveSpeed (pose, light, framing)
imageUi.refPose: Pose, background, light — like scene ref in «Model swap»
imageUi.noFaceCrop: Mode: crop without face — model face refs won't go into generation.
imageUi.autoAnalyze: You can «Generate» right away — analysis runs on the server automatically.
imageUi.maskPaint: Draw mask with brush — mark in white what to change on the shot.
imageUi.maskExternal: Brush alternative: fully prepared mask in external editor.
imageUi.promptHintDetail: Pose, place, outfit, light — in detail
imageUi.promptPhExample: e.g. bedroom, standing by window, red dress, soft daylight…
imageUi.pendingArchive: Image is ready but didn't land in Saved. You can save to archive without regenerating.
imageUi.upscalePick: Pick a shot from Saved or generate again
imageUi.toVideoTitle: Open Video tab with this frame
imageUi.downloadIosTitle: On iPhone Share menu opens — save to Photos without leaving the app
imageUi.bootstrapTagline: Two references: hair/face and overlay — base for turnaround sheet.
imageUi.devOutputHintPlain: Dev Vite build + STUDIO_ALLOW_PROMPT_ONLY=true on server only: WaveSpeed is not called; final JSON prompt is shown below.
imageUi.pipelineMain: Pipeline like workflow «By ref»: cabinet model + scene reference (Grok describes frame, WaveSpeed assembles shot).
imageUi.pipelineFaceSwap: Pipeline like workflow «Model swap»: cabinet model or separate identity photo + scene reference with a person.

videoUi.tagline: Ref clip, first frame and brief — finished videos in history on the right.
videoUi.noPermission: No generation permission. Contact the account owner.
videoUi.grokNotConfigured: Grok is not configured on the server.
videoUi.exifAria: Camera for EXIF when saving frame
videoUi.uploadWaitTitle: Wait until reference video finishes uploading to the server
videoUi.frameGenerating: Frame is generating — watch progress in Saved.
videoUi.videoGenerating: Video is generating — placeholder in Saved, usually 10–40 min. Updates automatically when ready.
videoUi.galleryEmpty: Your clips will appear here after Make video
videoUi.motionDefaultDesc: Motion like ref video. Keep scene, outfit and light from the first frame.
videoUi.motionDefaultDescShort: Motion like ref video. Keep scene and light from the first frame.
videoUi.grokSceneLine:
First frame (scene for your model, without appearance from video):
{{scene}}
